offer: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 policy documents/month, manual processing causes delays in underwriting. We automate document conversion instead of manual document processing and review.
problem: Manual processing of insurance policy documents leads to inconsistencies and delays in underwriting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 insurance brokers with demo video
Community forums where brokers share tools
try_it: Let users try basic document formatting options and interface for review
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
